rawContent: Task: 858-260409-174107 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 858-260409-174107 (verify graph memory commit cycle) completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each (~202s duration, full mode), updating PR #843. The verify stage reported FAIL with PagesPageConfig type constraint violations in .next/dev/types/validator.ts (errors TS2344 across multiple page modules). Despite verify FAIL, the pipeline proceeded through review-fix and ship without blocking, completing the shipment. This is the eleventh consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, and now 858) exhibiting the identical flaw: verify stage FAIL does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage. | Pattern: This is the eleventh consecutive run exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw. All prior retrospectives (10 runs across two days) recommended adding a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that halts when verify reports FAIL, but no implementation has occurred. The autofix stage cannot resolve PagesPageConfig type constraint violations, and the pipeline lacks a blocking mechanism at the verify-to-ship boundary. | Suggestion: Implement the verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template that was recommended in ten prior retrospectives without implementation. Add a check that reads the verify stage exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed typecheck validation. This is a configuration change to the ship stage template, not another retrospective observation. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
